titleStmt.title: SII 27.320: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 320. (A.R. No. 226 of 1937-38.) ELLĀREḌḌIPALLE, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in Survey No. 475 near the canal about three furlongs to the south-west of the village.

This badly damaged record refers to mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Sōmēśvaradēva-mahārāja bearing the epithet Trailōkyamalla-Bhujabala- Vīranārāyaṇa as governing Muḷiki-300, Honnahaḷi-90 and Peṇḍekal-800 divisions from [Vallū]rapaṭṭaṇa and registers a gift made over to Gōkarṇarāśi-gurudēva disciple (devotee ?) of Kamaḷaśaṅkaradēva. All other details are lost.
The extant portion of the record refers to the date as Śaka 1128, Prabhava. The Śaka year is wrong for 1129 corresponding to 1207-08 A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
damaged
Aṣṭama
hāsiddhi siddhavaṭa dēvara
divyaśrīpādhārādhakaṁ para
balasādhakaṁ nāmādi sama
sta praśasti sahitaṁ śrīmanu
mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ trai
ḷōkyamalla bhujabaḷavīra
nārāyaṇa sōmēśvara dē
vamahārājaru muḷi
ki muṁnūṟu hoṁnahaḷi
toṁbhattu peṁḍekalleṁṭu nū
ṟumaṁ duṣṭanigraha śiṣṭa pra
tipāḷanaṁ māḍiyāḷuttaṁ va
llūrapaṭṭaṇadoḷu sukha saṁ
kathā vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ
geyyuttamiralu

damaged
śrīma
vīranārāyaṇa
sā
yirada nūṟayippatteṁṭaneya
1128 prabhava saṁva
damaged
kaḷa vidyābitaraṇa cāturyya
caturāna nanuṁ śrīmatu kamaḷa
śaṁkara dēvara divya pādārā
dhakanuṁ śrīmatu pāspatavārdhi
vardhana sudhākaranuma
ppa gōkarnnarāśi gurudēvarggera[*] kā
laṁkarcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ mā
ḍi koṭṭaru svadattaṁ paradattaṁ
vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā ṣa
ṣṭhirvarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭheyāṁ
jāyatē krimiḥ
maṁgaḷa mahā śrī
śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.320 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
